name: Mexican Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 Pounds Pork Loin or Shoulder Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chopped onions and sliced carrots in the crockpot.
2. Rub the pork roast with the seasonings: salt, oregano, cumin seeds, and coriander.
3. Place the seasoned pork on top of the vegetables.
4. Add water to the crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 12 hours.
6. Once done, shred the pork roast.
7. Serve shredded pork in hot buttered tortillas with spicy taco sauce.
